may have noticed a change in the How Does LMG Spend Money video we posted recently. We had a process break-down and it contains footage from the channel of a former member of the LMG team that was used without prior approval. We have taken quick steps to rectify the issue. 

The frames are blurred for now and once YouTube is able to, we will work to try to replace the video with one that cuts the clips entirely. We have also committed to training for this process in the coming week to hopefully avoid a similar error in the future.

This changes nothing about our feelings toward our former teammates. We are so proud of them, and wish them nothing but success in the future, and we are excited to see all the incredible content they create. 

- Linus & LMG Team

Edit: The original post , along with our intent to post it, was sent to the former team member for review. It has been edited to also reflect that the footage was used without approval and that we've scheduled a training session for this issue."}]},"publishedTimeText":{"runs":[{"text":"2 months ago
